stories.headline: Trump says US has agreed to continue talks with Iran
stories.summary: President declares that ceasefire is ‘over’ despite ongoing negotiations

stories.headline: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Over But Talks on Deal to Continue
stories.summary:
President Donald Trump said the US would continue talks with Iran but considers the ceasefire between the countries to be over.
“The Islamic Republic of Iran has asked us to continue ‘talks.’ We have agreed to do so, but the United States has stated to them, in no uncertain terms, that the Cease Fire is OVER!,” Trump said Friday on social media. Trita Parsi, Executive Vice President at the Quincy Institute for Responsible Statecraft joined to dis

stories.headline: Trump Says Ceasefire With Iran Is Over
stories.summary: President Donald Trump said the US would continue talks with Iran but considers the ceasefire between the countries to be over. James Jeffrey, former US ambassador to Iraq and Turkey, talks about Trump's objectives in Iran and why the US is targeting infrastructure. He speaks on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Trump hints at further Iran negotiations after exchange of fire over Hormuz
stories.summary: Iran has not responded to Trump's latest claim, which comes as new attacks threaten the full resumption of war.

stories.headline: Trump Says Negotiations With Iran Will Continue as U.S. Ramps Up Strikes
stories.summary: U.S. forces hit more than 170 targets, including air defense systems, drone and missile storage sites, and military speedboats.

stories.headline: The U.S. and Iran Are Fighting Again. Is the Cease-Fire Over?
stories.summary: Eric Schmitt, a New York Times National Security correspondent, analyzes recent skirmishes between the U.S. and Iran and whether they threaten ongoing negotiations for a peace deal.

stories.headline: Bombing Iran Didn’t Work for Trump. Neither Did a Tentative Cease-Fire. Is There a Plan C?
stories.summary: The administration appears to be reverting to an all-stick, no-carrot approach. But it has yet to answer why it believes economic warfare and bombing will yield a different result this time.

stories.headline: Hospital workers wounded in Israeli drone attack on Gaza’s Kamal Adwan
stories.summary: Palestinian Health Ministry denounces attack as part of Israel's 'systematic targeting of health facilities'.

stories.headline: Trump Administration Fires Members of Independent Election Group
stories.summary: The firings and a resignation at the Election Assistance Commission came as President Trump has sought to impose control over how ballots will be counted in the November midterms.

stories.headline: Ukrainian drone strikes hit southern Russian refineries and Azov port, officials say
stories.summary: Kyiv says the strikes are fair retribution for Russia's more than four-year barrages on Ukraine and that it is a bid to force Russia to the negotiating table.

stories.summary: BHP Group is exploring the sale of a desalination plant in Chile, along with its electricity transmission assets, extending a strategy of monetizing infrastructure as the world’s biggest miner concentrates capital on its core copper business, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.headline: Trump threatens more strikes on Iran as Tehran warns of 'fearless' response

stories.headline: Bowen: For all his bluster, Trump has no better option than talks with Iran
